qa_pairs.question: What topics will be covered in the 'Migrating to the upgraded national systems' webinar regarding the impact of the upgrade?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar will address how the upgrade will affect a user's workflow, and whether there are significant changes to job scheduling and file systems on the new clusters.

qa_pairs.question: How will the 'Migrating to the upgraded national systems' webinar help users make the best use of the increased computing capacity?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar will explain how to make the best use of the increased computing capacity of the upgraded clusters, particularly in regards to computing nodes becoming much 'fatter' (many more CPU cores per node).

qa_pairs.question: What is the most significant change in computing that the 'Migrating to the upgraded national systems' webinar will discuss?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar will cover in detail the most significant change, which will happen to the way GPU computing is done.

qa_pairs.question: Will there be a Q&A session at the end of the 'Migrating to the upgraded national systems' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, there will be time for questions at the end of the webinar, and participants are encouraged to bring their questions and concerns.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the target audience for the 'Migrating to the upgraded national systems' webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar is intended for prospective users of the upgraded systems.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find recordings and materials from previous SHARCNET webinars?
qa_pairs.answer: Recordings and materials from previous SHARCNET webinars are available at http://youtube.sharcnet.ca.
